ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to remove empty sections (headings with no content) from weekly and quarterly review notes
ast.target: 选择是否从每周和季度复习笔记中移除空章节（无内容的标题）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove unchanged template lines from daily and weekly notes when compiling reviews. This helps highlight actual content you've written.
ast.target: 编译复习内容时，从每日和每周笔记中移除未更改的模板行。这有助于突出显示您实际编写的内容。
